description: Folio from a ledger of communal accounts. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Probably 12th century. Headed "Shabbat Maṭot: the collector (jābī) of the mezonot—Bū Naṣr...." Names include Bū l-Faraj; Bū l-Ḥasan; Bū l-Ṭāhir; Yosef al-Shomer; Maḥāsin al-Shammash; Bū l-Faḍl al-[...]. Other entries include "raisins for [qiddush]" and "by the order of Sayyidnā, bread for the stranger." Needs further examination. Not yet digitized.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
